summary: Completed backend testing of Evolution PRO - Contract PDF generation, post-signing notifications, and security fixes. All 13 tests passed. PDF generation via reportlab working correctly, stored in MongoDB and served via /api/contract/pdf-download/{partner_id}. Systeme.io tag integration configured (contratto_firmato tag ID 1958860). No hardcoded credentials in server.py - all moved to .env variables.
critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation uses reportlab with professional layout (A4, margins, tables, signature image)
PDF stored in MongoDB collection 'contract_pdfs' as base64 for secure download
send_contract_email replaced SMTP with Systeme.io tag assignment + Telegram admin notification
No hardcoded credentials in server.py - MONGO_ATLAS_URL and REDIS_FALLBACK_URL read from environment
Contract signing correctly handles already-signed partners with 'Contratto già firmato' message
test_credentials: Admin: claudio.bertogliatti@gmail.com / Evoluzione74, Partner ID: 2 (Arianna Aceto - signed contract), Client user_id: c407e3fc-5136-48f5-9162-babda5adccc8
seed_data_creation: None - used existing Partner 2 with signed contract
context_for_next_testing_agent: Contract PDF generation and download fully working. Partner 2 (Arianna Aceto) has signed contract with PDF stored in MongoDB (52KB+). Systeme.io tag 'contratto_firmato' (ID 1958860) configured for post-signing automation. SMTP replaced with Systeme.io + Telegram notifications. All hardcoded credentials removed from server.py.

features_tested.GET /api/contract/status/2: PASS - Returns signed=true with signed_at timestamp
features_tested.GET /api/contract/pdf-download/2: PASS - Returns application/pdf (52,654 bytes), valid PDF header
features_tested.POST /api/cliente-analisi/checkout with: PASS - Returns checkout_url with Stripe session

mocked_apis.notes: All APIs are real. Stripe checkout creates real sessions. Systeme.io tag assignment is real (requires contact to exist in Systeme.io). Telegram notifications sent to admin.
